observations: Verification entry #4 hardcodes the literal string 'SUMMARY: 8 passed, 0 failed'; accurate for the current validator (C1-C8) but will need updating if a future phase adds/removes a validator check. Not a defect for this contract.

Entries #1, #2, and #9 are now consistently [Unreleased]-scoped via the same awk idiom; entry #3 (AGIP) is correctly left whole-file-scoped since its target text lives in the released [0.1.0] section, not [Unreleased] -- scoping it to [Unreleased] would make it permanently unsatisfiable. This asymmetry is intentional and correct, not an inconsistency.

Rev1's #1 requires the literal filenames 'CONTEXT.md' and 'README.md' (not the bare words) -- this matches the contract's own instructed changelog style (all existing entries use backtick-quoted full filenames with extensions), so it should not cause a false failure against a compliant implementation.

rev1_findings_closed.prior_issue: Verification #1 (README/CONTEXT) was whole-file-scoped and vacuously satisfiable by pre-existing, unrelated text (line 21 'README presence', a bare word with no .md suffix, already inside [Unreleased] from a phase-002 entry).
rev1_findings_closed.fix_applied: Now extracts the [Unreleased] span via awk and requires the literal filenames 'CONTEXT.md' and 'README.md' (with .md suffix) within that span.
evidence: .agent/evidence/022-contract-review-rev1-01.txt (current tree: FAILS -- '[Unreleased] section missing: docs/guide/index.html CONTEXT.md README.md', confirming line 21's bare 'README' word no longer satisfies it)
wrong-section fixture (/tmp/.../CHANGELOG_wrongsection.md, mentions placed in [0.1.0] only): still FAILS with the same missing-list
right-section fixture (/tmp/.../CHANGELOG_rightsection.md, mentions placed correctly in [Unreleased]): PASSES

rev1_findings_closed.prior_issue: Verification #2 (interface.md/GIP.md) was whole-file-scoped and vacuously satisfiable by CHANGELOG.md line 81's pre-existing, unrelated 'tools/interface.md' mention inside the released [0.1.0] section.
rev1_findings_closed.fix_applied: Now extracts the [Unreleased] span via awk and requires both 'interface.md' and 'GIP.md' within that span only.
evidence: .agent/evidence/022-contract-review-rev1-02.txt (current tree: FAILS -- '[Unreleased] section missing: interface.md GIP.md', confirming line 81's [0.1.0] mention no longer satisfies it)

Direct check: awk-extracted [Unreleased] span currently contains none of interface.md/GIP.md/LICENSE/CONTEXT.md/README.md/docs/guide -- confirms both checks fail purely because the phase-003 entries are genuinely absent, not for a coincidental/wrong reason
wrong-section fixture: still FAILS; right-section fixture: PASSES

rev1_findings_closed.prior_issue: (non-blocking defense-in-depth request) Scope entry #9 (LICENSE) to [Unreleased] as well, for consistency with #1/#2.
rev1_findings_closed.fix_applied: Now uses the same awk-scoped extraction and requires 'LICENSE' within the [Unreleased] span.
evidence: .agent/evidence/022-contract-review-rev1-09.txt (current tree: FAILS -- '[Unreleased] section does not name the LICENSE addition')
wrong-section fixture: still FAILS; right-section fixture: PASSES

verification_entry_3_agip.scoping: correctly left whole-file (unchanged from initial contract)
verification_entry_3_agip.rationale: AGIP's only occurrence in the current tree is inside the released [0.1.0] section (line 62); scoping to [Unreleased] would make the check permanently unsatisfiable.
verification_entry_3_agip.current_tree_result: FAILS for the correct reason -- .agent/evidence/022-contract-review-rev1-03.txt: 'AGIP not expanded with parenthetical gloss' (pre-existing '...the earlier AGIP prototype)...' text still does not match 'AGIP \(|\([^)]*AGIP\)', confirmed by direct regex test)

full_suite_regression_on_positive_contro.fixture: /tmp/.../CHANGELOG_rightsection.md (phase-003 Added/Changed/Fixed entries in [Unreleased] + sourced AGIP gloss in [0.1.0])
full_suite_regression_on_positive_contro.result: all applicable checks (1, 2, 3, 8, 9, 10) PASS; checks 4, 5, 6, 7, 11 are unaffected by CHANGELOG.md content and remain PASS as previously verified on the real tree

acceptance_coverage_recheck: All 7 of feature 022's acceptance_tests in .agent/feature_list_003.json remain covered 1:1 by verification entries 1-7 (rev1 only tightened the command bodies; acceptance_test prose and coverage mapping unchanged from the initial review).

final_verdict.summary: Both HIGH-severity findings from the initial review (whole-file, vacuously-satisfiable greps in verification entries #1 and #2) are confirmed CLOSED in contract revision 1: both now scope to the [Unreleased] section via a consistent awk extraction, both correctly still FAIL on the current unmodified tree (for the right reason -- the phase-003 entries are genuinely absent from [Unreleased], and the pre-existing unrelated text at lines 21/81 no longer satisfies them), and both correctly FAIL against a constructed fixture that places the required mentions in the wrong section ([0.1.0]) while PASSING against a fixture that places them correctly in [Unreleased]. Entry #9 (LICENSE) received the same defense-in-depth scoping and is sound. Entry #3 (AGIP) was correctly left whole-file-scoped since its target lives in [0.1.0], and still fails now for the right reason. No new vacuous or wrong-reason check was introduced; a full positive-control fixture with genuine phase-003 entries plus the sourced AGIP gloss passes all 11 checks; all 7 feature-022 acceptance tests remain covered. The contract is APPROVED for evaluator contract review sign-off.
